revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- Categories and interwikis go at the bottom of this page. -->
== Usage == This template list the various styles that can be applied to cite link labels per [[Help:Cite link labels]].
Parameters: * '''interface''': When set, shows the interface pages and the test group.
{{pre|<nowiki>{{cite link label styles|interface=y}}</nowiki>}}
{{cite link label styles|interface=y}}
== See also ==
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| <!-- Categories and interwikis go here: -->
[[Category:Documentation assistance templates]] }}</includeonly>
<noinclude> [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- Categories and interwikis go at the bottom of this page. -->
== Usage == This template list the various styles that can be applied to cite link labels per [[Help:Cite link labels]].
Parameters: * '''interface''': When set, shows the interface pages and the test group.

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23168229401|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- Categories and interwikis go at the bottom of this page. -->
== Usage == This template list the various styles that can be applied to cite link labels per [[Help:Cite link labels]].
Parameters: * '''interface''': When set, shows the interface pages and the test group.
{{pre|<nowiki>{{cite link label styles|interface=y}}</nowiki>}}
{{cite link label styles|interface=y}} == See also ==

}}</includeonly>

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Cite_link_label_styles%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Cite_link_label_styles%2Fdoc for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{Documentation subpage}} <!-- Categories and interwikis go at the bottom of this page. -->
== Usage == This template list the various styles that can be applied to cite link labels per [[Help:Cite link labels]].
Parameters: * '''interface''': When set, shows the interface pages and the test group.
{{pre|<nowiki>{{cite link label styles|interface=y}}</nowiki>}}
{{cite link label styles|interface=y}} == See also ==
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| <!-- Categories and interwikis go here: -->
}}</includeonly>
<noinclude> [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Documentation assistance templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
